title: A Constitutional Execution Substrate for Proof-Bearing Autonomous Work
subtitle: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension · Sovereign Machine Economy Kernel v3
doctrine: A model can answer. An agent can act. An institution must prove.
description: The repository-aligned institutional edition of the GoalOS Sovereign Machine Economy Kernel v3: executable constitutional architecture, a source-generated six-stage autonomous capability chain, ten institutional use cases, seven worked reference case studies, reproducible publication assets, and explicit proof-to-permission boundaries.
edition: Institutional Use-Case and Case-Study Edition v3.0 · Repository Integration r2

repository_alignment.baseline_commit_title: Add GoalOS SME Kernel v3 — Autonomous End-to-End Constellation v3.2.0

reader_paths.question: What category is being created, and why might it matter?
How does an objective become a governed decision and bounded action?
What are the state machine, envelopes, signatures, Chronicle, and adapters?
Where does authority sit, how does the system fail closed, and what is not claimed?
What evidence is produced, how is it replayed, and what would falsify the thesis?
Which missions merit proof-gated autonomy, and what should reviewers receive?

lineage.label: META-AGENTIC α-AGI 👁️✨
lineage.role: The initial meta-agentic institution-forming agent: goals, roles, coordination, and bounded collective work.

lineage.label: AGI Alpha Node v0 ⚡️✨
lineage.role: The initial bounded execution node: work, receipts, proof surfaces, and reusable capability.

lineage.label: AGI Jobs v0 (v2) ✨
lineage.role: The initial agentic work market: missions, validation, challenge, coordination, and settlement intent.

lineage.label: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension — Sovereign Machine Economy ✨
lineage.role: The GoalOS-native constitutional synthesis: proof-bearing work, typed authority, durable memory, and fail-closed institutional execution.

architecture.label: AGI Alpha Node v0
architecture.role: Executes bounded work and emits evidence-bearing receipts.

architecture.label: AGI Jobs v0 (v2)
architecture.role: Coordinates work, validation, challenge, and non-live settlement intent.

architecture.label: Constitutional Kernel v3
architecture.role: Enforces typed state, signed handoffs, durable memory, and human authority.

use_cases.title: Executive decision intelligence
use_cases.summary: Move consequential strategy from narrative to a source-bound, scenario-tested governed decision state.
use_cases.evidence: Primary-source room, scenario matrix, contradiction register, option portfolio, risk ledger.
use_cases.authority: Executive owner records disposition; no automatic strategic commitment.
use_cases.fail_closed: No clear owner, decision criterion, counterfactual, provenance, or stop condition.

use_cases.title: AI procurement and vendor authorization
use_cases.summary: Grant only scoped pilot permission after equal-budget tests, policy checks, and exit-readiness review.
use_cases.evidence: Comparable trials, policy and data boundary, security review, pilot certificate, exit plan.
use_cases.authority: Procurement, security, legal, and business owners approve only the declared pilot scope.
use_cases.fail_closed: Unequal evaluation, hidden data dependency, unresolved policy breach, or no exit route.

use_cases.title: Autonomous software delivery
use_cases.summary: Turn patches into test-backed, provenance-bound, rollback-ready release candidates.
use_cases.evidence: Change provenance, tests, reviewer trace, dependency record, release and rollback plan.
use_cases.authority: Authorized human release owner approves deployment; the reference system never auto-deploys.
use_cases.fail_closed: Failing tests, secret exposure, missing provenance, unreviewed dependencies, or no rollback.

use_cases.title: Defensive cybersecurity remediation
use_cases.summary: Convert findings into secret-safe, reviewable, minimal defensive change.
use_cases.evidence: Finding proof, minimal patch, test evidence, secret-safe logs, review record, rollback.
use_cases.authority: Security owner authorizes defensive deployment inside an explicit system boundary.
use_cases.fail_closed: Offensive scope, unverified finding, leaked secrets, excessive change, or absent rollback.

use_cases.title: Scientific discovery and experimental design
use_cases.summary: Prioritize falsifiable hypotheses, controls, assays, and evidence-producing experiments.
use_cases.evidence: Evidence graph, competing mechanisms, controls, assays, uncertainty, falsification plan, lineage.
use_cases.authority: Principal investigator and applicable ethics or safety bodies authorize physical execution.
use_cases.fail_closed: No competing hypothesis, inadequate controls, non-falsifiable objective, or broken lineage.

use_cases.title: Critical infrastructure and energy resilience
use_cases.summary: Recommend bounded interventions with baseline fidelity, safety, pilot, stop, and rollback conditions.
use_cases.evidence: Baseline, instrumentation, sensitivity analysis, bounded pilot, stop rules, rollback plan.
use_cases.authority: Designated operator and applicable safety or regulatory authority authorize field action.
use_cases.fail_closed: Weak baseline, unsafe envelope, missing instrumentation, no stop rule, or irreversible pilot.

use_cases.title: Policy and regulatory mission operations
use_cases.summary: Preserve primary law, plurality, distributional effects, uncertainty, and institutional authority.
use_cases.evidence: Primary sources, stakeholder plurality, impact analysis, dissent record, dependencies, reversal conditions.
use_cases.authority: Only the legally empowered public institution may decide or implement policy.
use_cases.fail_closed: Stale law, single-viewpoint analysis, hidden distributional effects, or no dissent pathway.

use_cases.title: M&A, partnership, and investment diligence
use_cases.summary: Bind strategic claims to dependencies, counterfactuals, integration conditions, and value realization.
use_cases.evidence: Claim-dependency matrix, downside cases, counterfactuals, integration plan, value-realization tests.
use_cases.authority: Investment committee, board, or delegated owner records the transaction decision.
use_cases.fail_closed: Unbound claims, absent downside case, no integration conditions, or unsupported value thesis.

use_cases.title: Proof-gated agentic work markets
use_cases.summary: Commission, execute, validate, challenge, and prepare settlement without unearned authority.
use_cases.evidence: Identity, mission charter, coalition record, receipts, validator opinions, dissent, challenge, settlement intent.
use_cases.authority: Human settlement review remains mandatory; no live value moves in the reference release.
use_cases.fail_closed: Self-validation, hidden coalition, missing challenge rights, unresolved dissent, or automatic settlement.

use_cases.title: Autonomous institutional publication
use_cases.summary: Generate public artifacts from proof-aligned source through deterministic QA and human-review pull requests.
use_cases.evidence: Source lineage, deterministic build, accessibility, link and visual checks, claim review, PR evidence.
use_cases.authority: A human reviewer merges and deploys; generated material cannot publish itself.
use_cases.fail_closed: Source drift, failed QA, inaccessible output, unsafe claims, or absent human review.

case_studies.title: 48-hour market-entry proof mission
case_studies.summary: Decision support with a source room, option portfolio, contradiction register, risks, conditions, and human disposition.

case_studies.title: Mission-critical AI procurement gate
case_studies.summary: Executed vendor evaluation, policy and data boundary, bounded pilot certificate, and exit plan.

case_studies.title: Defensive remediation and rollback-ready release
case_studies.summary: Finding proof, minimal patch, tests, secret-safe logs, pull-request review, and rollback.

case_studies.title: Cold-chain energy resilience
case_studies.summary: Baseline, instrumentation, interventions, sensitivity, pilot controls, delayed outcomes, and revocable capability package.

case_studies.title: Scientific discovery and experiment design
case_studies.summary: Evidence graph, competing mechanisms, controls, assays, uncertainty, falsification, and lineage memory.

case_studies.title: Public policy option mission
case_studies.summary: Primary sources, stakeholder plurality, distributional impact, dissent, implementation dependencies, and reversal conditions.

case_studies.title: Proof-gated agentic work market
case_studies.summary: Identity, coalition selection, node receipt, proof parliament, dissent, challenge, and human settlement review.

validation.label: fonts embedded in both major PDFs

claim_boundary.positive: The publication defines a theoretical systems and protocol architecture, an executable browser-local reference implementation, and a falsifiable evaluation program. The use cases and case studies are illustrative reference scenarios.
not_claimed: independent certification or external audit completion
production authorization or public production reliance
live settlement, token movement, or user-fund authorization
autonomous sovereignty, energy abundance, or civilization-scale capability
